name: story-swapper-pro
description: Story Swapper — Mad Libs-style word swap game (Vite web app)

scripts.dev: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && vite
scripts.build: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:watch: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && vitest
scripts.test:full: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && cross-env TEST_FULL=1 vitest run
scripts.test:browser: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=/story-swapper-pro/ vite build && npm run test:browser:run
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:dict && npm run sync:madlibs && cross-env TEST_FULL=1 vitest run --coverage
